tasks.subject: Task 1: Load flag metadata from story.yaml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parse the optional flags section from story.yaml and store in storyMeta.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `storyMeta` module-level variable exists
- [ ] `storyMeta.flags` available after startStory
- [ ] Stories without flags section work unchanged

**Verify:** Add flags to demo story.yaml, check storyMeta.flags in console.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["storyMeta variable exists", "storyMeta.flags populated from story.yaml", "absent flags section defaults to {}"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Render visible flags in the HUD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HUD shows visible flags that are currently true, below stats.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Visible+true flags show their label in HUD
- [ ] Section absent when no visible flags are true
- [ ] Visually distinct from stats
- [ ] Non-declared or non-visible flags never appear

**Verify:** Add has_lantern visible flag to demo. Buy lantern — label appears in HUD.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["visible true flags show label", "section absent when none", "styled distinctly from stats"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Render failed choices as greyed-out with failure text
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Failed choices grey out with flavour text instead of hiding (unless hide_if_failed: true).

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `style.css`
- Modify: `stories/demo/scenes/start.yaml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No failed_text + no hide_if_failed = greyed with auto-text
- [ ] failed_text present = greyed with that text
- [ ] hide_if_failed: true = hidden (current behaviour)
- [ ] Auto-text format: *(Requires: gold ≥ 5)*
- [ ] Demo lantern choice gets hide_if_failed: true

**Verify:** Start demo with gold=10. Lantern choice hidden. Manually set gold<5 in localStorage, reload — lantern still hidden (hide_if_failed). A choice without hide_if_failed that fails should grey.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js", "style.css", "stories/demo/scenes/start.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auto-text generated from requires", "failed_text overrides auto-text", "hide_if_failed hides completely", "demo lantern has hide_if_failed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update templates and stage-1 docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add flags section to story template, failed_text/hide_if_failed to scene template, planning note to stage-1.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/story.yaml`
- Modify: `templates/scene.yaml`
- Modify: `docs/storycrafting/stage-1-structure.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] story template has commented flags section
- [ ] scene template has failed_text and hide_if_failed examples
- [ ] stage-1 notes visible flags and grey-vs-hide planning

**Verify:** Read all three files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/story.yaml", "templates/scene.yaml", "docs/storycrafting/stage-1-structure.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["story template has flags section", "scene template has failed_text and hide_if_failed", "stage-1 has planning note"]}
```
